name: Gak
recipeIngredient: 2 cups White School Type Glue (Elmers, Manco)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the glue with warm water and food coloring until desired shade is achieved.
2. Dissolve the borax in warm water, breaking up any lumps if necessary.
3. Pour Solution A into Solution B.
4. Carefully scoop out the Gak from the reaction solution and gently knead it until no longer slippery.
5. Enjoy your homemade Gak! For more vibrant colors, use paste-type colorings available at craft stores.
